name: Potato Packets
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Parmesan or cheddar cheese, shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. Divide the potatoes, carrots, and onion equally between four pieces of heavy-duty aluminum foil (approximately 18x12 inches).
2. Top each portion with butter; sprinkle with salt if desired and pepper.
3. Bring opposite short ends of the foil together over the vegetables and fold down several times.
4. Fold the unsealed ends toward the vegetables and crimp tightly to seal.
5. Grill, covered, over medium coals for 20-30 minutes or until the potatoes are tender.
6. Remove from the grill.
7. Open the foil and sprinkle with cheese; reseal for an additional 5 minutes or until the cheese melts.
